headline: Agco (AGCO) Beats Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: Agco (AGCO) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +112.81% and +1.71%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
